# Oracle beliefs — the upside engine's living mind

_Read at the top of every session; update at the bottom. Forward worldview, open
theses, lessons, decayed edges._

## Worldview (2026-07-06, first upside run)

Oracle hunts the few under-covered names with the biggest REAL upside over a
6–24mo hold. The edge is the breadth read — reading filings the desk doesn't, in
the small-cap corner. The spotlight only AIMS; the read decides.

## Open theses (paper — pending_funding)

- **SABR (Sabre Corp)** — KEEP/FUND (paper). Levered deleveraging turnaround: a
  thin equity sliver on a ~$4.6B EV, six consecutive improving EPS prints, EBITDA
  +21% / bookings at a 2-yr high, still priced like distressed debt ~40% below its
  prior high. upside_x 2.0, p 0.40, downside 0.55 (can go to zero — the interest
  burden IS the thesis), 18mo. Catalyst: FCF→positive 2027 + continued beats
  re-rating EV through ~5.5x leverage. Next print 2026-08-06. Kill: EBITDA YoY ≤ 0.
  Sole survivor of the first 10-name read.

## Lessons

1. **Trailing-6mo momentum surfaces blowoff-and-fade, not "still early."** The
   first spotlight's relative-strength net (6mo trailing marketcap change) fed the
   read 10 names, and the read killed 9 — SIX of them purely on "already arrived"
   (WLY, MX, BBCP, MRVI, MEI, PAYS all ran 2–4x on exactly the thesis and rolled
   over; the 6mo window captured the spike but it had already deflated). Trailing
   momentum ≠ early. FIX: use RECENT trend (e.g. last 4–6 weeks positive off a
   base), not 6mo trailing, and/or explicitly penalize names near a 52-wk high.
2. **The screen's fundamental signals lie without a read.** EPC's "margin
   improving" was actually margin COMPRESSING (−310bps); WLY's "revenue accel" was
   FLAT revenue. The q/q-on-3-seasonal-quarters accel + netinc-margin proxy is
   noisy. The read caught both. This is *why* the read is the edge, not the screen.
3. **The blowup filter earns its keep.** KPTI killed on going-concern / ~2–3mo
   runway vs a 6–24mo hold; POET killed as pre-revenue narrative (+cancelled anchor
   customer). Survival gate working.
4. **One fundable of ten is an honest yield** when the queue is stale winners. The
   discipline (refuse the already-arrived) is the point — chasing them is F3/q4.

## Decayed / de-prioritized

- 6mo-trailing-momentum as a "still early" net — DECAYED (surfaces arrived names).
  Rewire before the next run.

## Engine gaps to wire (Stage 0–1)

- RECENT-trend momentum (not 6mo trailing) + a near-52wk-high penalty.
- The TOP-DOWN thematic net (needs a forming-themes map) — off this run, under-counts.
- Real analyst-coverage data (proxied as thin) and eps_surprise (an earnings feed).
- y/y or TTM revenue trajectory (needs the year-ago quarter) to de-noise accel.
